title: ranunculus caucasicus subsp. pavlii
intro: Ranunculus caucasicus subsp. pavlii, also known as Pavli's ranunculus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to have several health benefits. The health benefits of Ranunculus caucasicus subsp. pavlii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Ranunculus caucasicus subsp. pavlii can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various conditions.
